SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ABRAHAM PANOSSIAN--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TOM FUJIMOTO--OFFICE ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CA DENT LAB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAGHEZCHI, DR. KHALIL SANTA CLARA FAMILY DENTISTRY, INC. $597.00 PRINCIPAL, $218.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $815.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
